description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Release that triggers on published or edited releases and on push to the master branch when the .github/workflows/release.yml file changes. Use an ubuntu-latest job to check out the code, set up QEMU and Buildx with debug flags, log in to Docker Hub using DOCKERHUB_USERNAME and DOCKERHUB_TOKEN from secrets, and then build the Docker image by running the build.sh script in the contrib/docker directory with the release argument.
